ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market analysis report */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "number_of_analysts" INTEGER /* Number of analysts contributing to the analysis */,
  "highest_target_price" REAL /* Highest target price set by analysts */,
  "lowest_target_price" REAL /* Lowest target price set by analysts */,
  "average_target_price" REAL /* Average target price calculated from analysts */,
  "share_price" REAL /* Current share price of the stock */,
  "upside_potential" TEXT /* Potential upside expressed as a percentage */,
  "market_condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market condition associated with the analysis */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report generated from the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analyses_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analyses_market_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_condition_id") REFERENCES market_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the company's initial public offering */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the company is based */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "firm" TEXT /* Name of the firm the analyst is associated with */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience the analyst has */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise for the analyst */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Relevant certifications held by the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analysis associated with the prediction */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analyst making the prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being predicted */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price for the stock */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the analyst in their prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES market_analyses ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_history" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock associated with the trade */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was traded */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (buy or sell) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_history_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market condition */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the market condition */,
  "impact_level" TEXT /* Level of impact on stock prices (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the market condition */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the market condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the strategy */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the strategy (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "expected_return" REAL /* Expected return on investment for the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to user role */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report detailing analysis findings */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analysis associated with the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES market_analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., alert, update, message) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing feedback */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analysis associated with the feedback */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user, on a scale from 1 to 5 */,
  "submitted_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report associated with the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES market_analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with the session */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user logged out */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock associated with the indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator (e.g., EPS, P/E ratio, dividend yield) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_portfolio" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio entry */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analyst associated with the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock in the portfolio */,
  "position_size" REAL /* Size of the position in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_portfolio_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_portfolio_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock associated with the news article */,
  "news_title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "news_content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date when the news article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
